top_signals.title: New scoreboard shows success of European startup policies
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 29 May 2026 Europe's startup and scaleup ecosystem has been growing steadily, according to the first-ever European Startup and Scaleup Scoreboard (ESSS) published today by the European Commission.
